jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
